# Personal Task Tracker

> Owner: duanejevon@gmail.com  ·  Created: 2026-06-19

## Begin (raw)
<!-- 3-minute brain dump. Do not edit or reinterpret. -->
Build a personal task tracker app that can run offline, and have a kanban board style with different colour cards.

## Refine (scope)
- **Goal**: New habit entirely — no existing task-tracking system to track tasks today; this starts it.
- **In / Out of scope**:
  - In: multiple boards/projects, each with its own kanban columns, colored cards, due dates, reminders.
  - Out: cloud sync / multi-device sync.
- **Definition of Done**: Multi-board support — several boards/projects, each with its own columns and colored cards, switchable between boards. Runs fully offline as a desktop app.
- **Constraints**: Desktop app, fully offline by default. Tech stack TBD — first Arrange intent should decide (e.g. Electron vs Tauri).
- **Risks**: (optional)
- **Resources**: (optional)
- **Dependencies**: (optional)
